prompt: Tech debt audit of WorldPulse API with dual DB containers, no integration tests, mixed SQL patterns, inconsistent cache keys. Should categorize, prioritize, flag specific issues, and provide remediation plan.

assertions.name: uses_categories
assertions.description: Categorizes debt items (Infrastructure, Test debt, Code debt, etc.)

assertions.name: flags_dual_db
assertions.description: Specifically addresses the dual database situation

assertions.name: has_remediation_plan
assertions.description: Includes concrete next steps or phased plan
